scripts.postinstall: node node_modules/patch-package/index.js && node scripts/dev/platform-install.mjs stamp root && node scripts/dev/fix-eslint-brace-expansion.mjs
scripts.backend:dev: node scripts/dev/platform-install.mjs check backend && npm run dev --prefix apps/backend-api
scripts.backend:debug: node scripts/dev/platform-install.mjs check backend && npm run debug --prefix apps/backend-api
scripts.backend:build: node scripts/dev/platform-install.mjs check backend --profile=backend-build && npm run build --prefix apps/backend-api
scripts.backend:start: node scripts/dev/platform-install.mjs check backend && npm run start --prefix apps/backend-api
scripts.backend:db:setup: node scripts/dev/platform-install.mjs check backend && npm run db:setup --prefix apps/backend-api
scripts.backend:db:reset: node scripts/dev/platform-install.mjs check backend && npm run db:reset --prefix apps/backend-api
scripts.backend:db:verify: node scripts/dev/platform-install.mjs check backend && npm run db:verify --prefix apps/backend-api
scripts.backend:db:test:setup: node scripts/dev/platform-install.mjs check backend && npm run db:test:setup --prefix apps/backend-api
scripts.backend:db:test:reset: node scripts/dev/platform-install.mjs check backend && npm run db:test:reset --prefix apps/backend-api
scripts.backend:test:integration: node scripts/dev/platform-install.mjs check backend && npm run test:integration --prefix apps/backend-api
scripts.backend:test:integration:raw: node scripts/dev/platform-install.mjs check backend && npm run test:integration:raw --prefix apps/backend-api
scripts.mobile:start: node scripts/dev/platform-install.mjs check mobile && npm run start --prefix apps/mobile
scripts.mobile:android: node scripts/dev/platform-install.mjs check mobile && npm run android --prefix apps/mobile
scripts.mobile:ios: node scripts/dev/platform-install.mjs check mobile && npm run ios --prefix apps/mobile
scripts.admin:dev: node scripts/dev/platform-install.mjs check admin && npm run dev --prefix apps/admin
scripts.admin:build: node scripts/dev/platform-install.mjs check admin && npm run build --prefix apps/admin
scripts.admin:preview: node scripts/dev/platform-install.mjs check admin && npm run preview --prefix apps/admin
